items.title: Can I rent the bike for a week?
content: Yes, the minimum rental period is 7 days.

items.title: Is the battery included?
content: Yes, the bike comes with one battery included.
It is also possible to rent a second battery for an additional fee.

items.title: Am I limited in choosing a settlement partner?
content: No, you have full freedom to choose your settlement partner.
You can cooperate with any partner.

items.title: Is the bike legal?
content: Yes, all our bikes are fully legal.
They have pedal-assist limited to 25 km/h and assistance works only while pedaling.

items.title: Can I use the off-road mode?
content: Yes, you can use the off-road mode.
If you enable it according to the manufacturer’s instructions or other available sources, it is not a problem for us.
